channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: The economic winners & losers in the US-Israel war on Iran
item.description: The economic winners & losers in the US-Israel war on Iran

item.title: Indian physicists voice solidarity with Iran, Palestine, Lebanon academics
item.description: In a statement, prominent string theorists condemn the attacks on universities across the Middle Eastern countries.

item.title: How Iran raised Hormuz stakes by capturing ships
item.description: After the US and Israel launched a war on Iran on February 28, Tehran blocked the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Israeli strike near mosque kills five in Gaza, including three children
item.description: An Israeli air strike near a mosque in Gaza killed at least five Palestinians, including three children.

item.title: Iran war: How big is the global energy shock?
item.description: More than 500 million barrels of oil disrupted in just weeks, reshaping global energy flows.

item.title: Lufthansa cuts 20,000 flights as Iran war causes jet fuel shortage
item.description: The German airline says 20,000 short-haul flights would be removed from its ⁠schedule between now and October.

item.title: What we know about Israel killing Lebanese journalist Amal Khalil
item.description: Khalil was killed and her colleague injured in what Lebanese officials are calling a 'double-tap' strike by Israel.

item.title: Who is John Phelan, the US Navy Secretary fired by Pete Hegseth?
item.description: Phelan's firing reveals turbulence in US military leadership amid the ongoing US-Israeli war with Iran.

item.title: India to Iran: How two wars shaped the rise of Pakistan’s Asim Munir
item.description: The war against India a year ago led to Munir's elevation to the status of field marshal. Now he's playing peacemaker.

item.title: Israeli strike kills five in Gaza, including three children
item.description: Israel has committed 2,400 violations of the 'ceasefire' deal struck with Hamas in October, Gaza officials say.
